ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Invalid Syncthing API key. Please check your settings.
ast.target: Syncthing API 密钥无效。请检查您的设置。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Please insert your Syncthing API key in the plugin settings.
ast.target: 请在插件设置中输入您的 Syncthing API 密钥。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Syncthing API token is not set. Cannot poll for events.
ast.target: Syncthing API 令牌未设置。无法轮询事件。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Syncthing API key is invalid (401 Unauthorized or CSRF Error).
ast.target: Syncthing API 密钥无效（401 未授权或 CSRF 错误）。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to parse Syncthing events or unexpected response:
ast.target: 解析 Syncthing 事件失败或收到意外响应：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Syncthing API token is not set. Cannot check connections.
ast.target: Syncthing API 令牌未设置。无法检查连接。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to parse Syncthing connections or unexpected response:
ast.target: 解析 Syncthing 连接失败或收到意外响应：

ast.name: error
ast.target: Syncthing 连接 API 错误：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often the system checks for new events.
ast.target: 系统检查新事件的频率。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API token to use Syncthing API. You can find this in Syncthing UI: Actions (top right) -> Settings -> General -> API Key.
ast.target: 用于 Syncthing API 的 API 令牌。您可以在 Syncthing UI 中找到它：操作（右上角）-> 设置 -> 常规 -> API 密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Syncthing folder ID, without setting this the plugin will pickup changes from any of your synced folders
ast.target: Syncthing 文件夹 ID，不设置此项插件将从您任何同步的文件夹中获取更改

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please insert your Syncthing API key in the plugin settings to monitor status.
ast.target: 请在插件设置中输入您的 Syncthing API 密钥以监控状态。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Invalid Syncthing API key. Please check your settings.
ast.target: Syncthing API 密钥无效。请检查您的设置。
